scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules contracts/node_modules dapp/node_modules contracts/generated dapp/src/generated dapp/dist dapp/dist-server deploy
scripts.contracts:compile: pnpm --filter contracts compile && pnpm --filter dapp codegen
scripts.codegen: pnpm run contracts:compile && pnpm run contracts:artifact
scripts.dev: pnpm run sync:network && pnpm run codegen && pnpm --filter dapp dev:proxy
scripts.build: pnpm run sync:network && pnpm run codegen && pnpm --filter dapp build && pnpm --filter dapp build:server
scripts.stack:up: pnpm run sync:network && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.stack:rebuild: pnpm run sync:network && docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate
